text.title: Synthetic Users Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding the synthetic-users methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Output MUST be gated by a real-user validation plan within 30 days.
rule.rationale: Without the gate synthetic findings calcify.
Stakeholders treat unlabelled AI output as decision-grade.

rule.statement: At least 5 concept variants per round.
rule.rationale: Fewer variants bias the directional read.

rule.statement: Synthetic users MUST NOT be used in medical / financial / safety contexts.
rule.rationale: LLM priors do not approximate vulnerable users.

rule.statement: Report MUST highlight where synthetic reactions match the team's prior expectations vs surprise findings.
rule.rationale: Confirmation bias is the dominant failure mode.

rule.statement: When preconditions hold, run the full procedure end-to-end and emit the output artefact.
rule.rationale: Routes positive decision-tree leaves to the procedure.

rule.statement: When preconditions fail or skip-conditions hold, exit without producing the artefact and document why.
rule.rationale: Routes negative decision-tree leaves out without polluting the output channel.
